name: High Prophet of the Doomsday Caucus
type: Legendary Acorn Creature — Human Prophet Cleric
text:
Whenever you make a Prophecy, you may make it twice and keep the better outcome. Two heads are better than one; four is showing off.
Prophecy (As this resolves, predict a number 1 through 6 out loud, then roll a six-sided die.) At the beginning of your upkeep, make a Prophecy. If correct, each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life. If wrong, put three doom counters on the Doomsday Clock and look at the table apologetically.
flavorText: Holds the record for Most Confident Incorrect Predictions, a record she insists she will break tomorrow.
